idea-plugin.name: WebView Runtime (Experimental)
idea-plugin.description:
Provides an embedded WebView panel for IntelliJ-based IDEs, making it possible to build rich local IDE UI with the standard web stack.
  • Supports HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and framework-based UI such as React, Preact, Svelte, Lit, or plain Web Components.
  • Uses Vite to build frontend sources into static assets that can be bundled with IDE plugins.
  • Provides typed Kotlin and TypeScript interop so WebView UI can call IDE code and receive data through strongly typed contracts.
  • Runs on browser engines: WKWebView on macOS, Microsoft Edge WebView2 on Windows, and JCEF on Linux.

registryKey.description: Forces the ui.webview engine: SYSTEM or JCEF. JCEF rendering follows the JBCEF registry flags
Shows a diagnostic engine label inside ui.webview pages
Enable heavyweight facade for Swing overlays shown above native WebView hosts
